description:
This quiz assesses proficiency with Regular Expressions, covering basic patterns, quantifiers, grouping, and look‑around assertions. It is moderately challenging, encouraging learners to apply and deepen their regex skills through practical matching tasks. The tone is supportive and motivational, urging continued practice to achieve mastery.
Topics: Regular expression syntax, Quantifiers, Capture groups and non‑capture groups, Look‑ahead and look‑behind assertions, Pattern validation
Audience: Developers, QA engineers, and computer science students who have foundational knowledge of regex and want to sharpen their pattern‑matching abilities.
